subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! Ye have ever been, and continue to be, remembered in this divine assemblage, and at all times with the tongue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان همواره در این انجمن رحمانی مذکور بوده و هستید و همیشه بلسان
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
